headline: Are Analysts Crazy? Price Targets Suggest 29% Jump In S&P 500. These 10 Stocks Show Highest Potential Gains.
summary: The S&P 500, and the stock market in general, is going through its worst decline since last year's tariff announcements. Still, Wall Street analysts are bullish — or maybe a little crazy. Price targets for S&P 500 stocks are, on the whole, 28.

headline: What The Market Got Wrong With Uber (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Uber Technologies is upgraded to a Strong Buy as the stock is down around 30% over the past 6 months. Click to read this UBER update.

headline: Credit card annual fees are soaring past $800. Here’s why people keep paying them—even as perks are harder to come by
summary: Shoppers and travelings keep gravitating to premium 'lifestyle' cards, but interest rates and reward restrictions can trap unwary consumers.
